visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair and extensive sleeve-style tattoos on both arms, wearing a black oversized t-shirt and multiple chunky gold chains, enters a room through a beige door. He gestures towards a woman sitting at a table that holds a roll cake and other snacks. The indoor lighting is bright and even. (2) The man leans over the table, engaging in an animated conversation with the woman, who has short dark hair and wears a striped shirt. He produces a stack of hundred-dollar bills. The background contains shelving units filled with shoe boxes and anime figurines. (3) The man appears in a bright white studio setting, now wearing a white athletic jersey. He holds a tube of Dr.Douxi Mandelic Acid Facial Cleanse, smiling broadly and pointing to the brand label. (4) A montage sequence shows the man in a clean white bathroom. He applies white cleansing foam to his face, massaging his skin thoroughly before rinsing at a modern white sink. He looks into the mirror and dries his face with a white towel. (5) Detailed close-up shots show various concentrations of Dr.Douxi Mandelic Acid Essence (5%, 10%, 18%, and 30%). The man is seen applying drops of the clear liquid to his hand and face. (6) The man stands behind a table displaying the complete product line. He picks up a large bottle of body cleanser and a spray bottle, showcasing them to the camera with high energy. (7) The video ends with the man and woman sitting together; the man holds a handful of cash and a product bottle while both smile and give thumbs-up gestures.

[Slogan]: 變種王小姐: 再使出鈔能力 ATK: 10. (6) [Subtitle]: 錢!! (7) [Subtitle]: 一百塊都跟你杯去吃. [Slogan]: 變種王小姐: 再使出鈔能力 ATK: 99. (8) [Subtitle]: 一百塊倒在地板上. (9) [Subtitle]: 五分鐘啊. (10) [Subtitle]: 就這樣啊. [Slogan]: 變種王小姐: 使出終極鈔能力 ATK: 99999999999. (11) [Subtitle]: 沒啦我是說 不用收啦. (12) [Subtitle]: 我來收就好 謝謝謝謝. (13) [Variety]: 蔡緯嘉!!! (14) [Subtitle]: 是想拿是不是啊. (15) [Subtitle]: 老娘問你一個問題啊. (16) [Subtitle]: 老實說啦. (17) [Subtitle]: 老娘滿意再加你2000. (18) [Subtitle]: 你皮膚為什麼那麼好. (19) [Subtitle]: 皮膚是不是 小嘎就是用這個. (20) [Subtitle]: 想要嘎哥的好皮膚 首先就要把臉洗乾淨啊. (21) [Subtitle]: 來啦這是業界唯一. [Variety]: 杏仁酸. (22) [Variety]: 杏仁酸跟胺基酸 結合的洗面乳. (23) [Slogan]: 朵璽杏仁酸 高濃度胺基酸洗面乳. (24) [Subtitle]: 洗完後不會過度乾澀緊繃. (25) [Subtitle]: 含白柳樹皮萃取 幫忙調理角質. (26) [Subtitle]: 溫和帶走髒污. (27) [Subtitle]: 後續保養吸收 就速就哺啦!!. (28) [Subtitle]: 哪還有嗎 有有有有. (29) [Slogan]: 5%朵璽杏仁酸精華. (30) [Subtitle]: 做好基礎代謝 讓膚況乖乖聽話. (31) [Slogan]: 10%朵璽杏仁酸精華. (32) [Subtitle]: 改善煩人的顆粒跟大毛孔. (33) [Subtitle]: 厲害的來嘍 來如果你臉皮厚. (34) [Variety]: ???. (35) [Subtitle]: 摸起來像柚子皮的 用這個. (36) [Slogan]: 18%朵璽杏仁酸精華. (37) [Subtitle]: 濃度高的plus版18% 局部加強. (38) [Subtitle]: 壓力痘、生理痘、滿臉痘. (39) [Subtitle]: 點塗上去 隔天馬上有感. (40) [Subtitle]: 最後進階專用的30%. [Slogan]: 30%朵璽杏仁酸精華. (41) [Variety]: 難搞的荳印痕跡. (42) [Subtitle]: 難搞的就靠它. (43) [Subtitle]: 你就堅持擦 像baby肌 白泡泡幼咪咪. (44) [Subtitle]: 不用再花好幾千塊 去做臉清粉刺. (45) [Subtitle]: 來現在朵璽杏仁酸全系列. [Variety]: 嘎哥優惠團購中!. (46) [Subtitle]: 不只要照顧你的臉 連你的身體都把你照顧好好的. (47) [Subtitle]: 那個美女有沒有 有時候痘痘吼 有夠煩的. (48) [Slogan]: 背部顆粒殺手 杏仁酸換膚淨透沐浴露 杏仁酸換膚無瑕身體噴霧水. (49) [Subtitle]: 保證還你漂亮美背 走在路上回頭率超高. (50) [Subtitle]: 欸!介紹的不錯嘛 啊謝謝謝謝. visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male main creator and 1 female collaborator acting as a character.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male with brown hair, distinctive arm tattoos (traditional style), wearing a black t-shirt, large gold chains, and later a white sports jersey.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor apartment setting with a doorway leading to another room, shelves containing shoeboxes (Dragon Ball Z branded), and anime statues. A modern bathroom with a white ceramic sink and mirror. A plain white studio background for product presentation.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with a sharp percussive thud, immediately followed by a high-energy male voice projecting loudly with a casual, humorous tone. No background music is present for the first second. (2) A quick transition whoosh SFX occurs, and upbeat electronic pop music with a strong synth beat fades in. A male voice continues at a high speed, punctuated by the rhythmic sound of paper rustling (simulated cash). A female voice responds in a calm, slightly lower pitch. (3) A series of bright pop and bubble SFX coincide with the appearance of text on screen. The male voice transitions into a more structured, narrative delivery typical of product reviews, maintaining high arousal and clarity. (4) Distinct liquid splashing and bubbling SFX are layered over the continuous BGM as the narrator describes a face-washing process. The vocal articulation remains crisp and professional. (5) Several high-pitched 'ding' SFX are used to emphasize different product labels. The BGM remains constant with its electronic drum pattern. (6) The video concludes with a final enthusiastic exclamation from the male voice and a short musical stinger that quickly fades to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Transition -> Product Demonstration -> Comparison -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous, high-energy skit involving cash to grab attention (the 'hook') before pivoting to a detailed endorsement and review of Dr.Douxi's mandelic acid skincare line. It aims to demonstrate product efficacy and promote a group-buy offer.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, detailed explanation of ingredients (mandelic acid), and clear 'group buy' CTA at the end.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video blends social media comedy trends (the '钞能力' or money power meme) with standard beauty influencer review formats to maintain high engagement.
